title: Jamaican Toast with Gooey Cheese
description: A simple breakfast recipe featuring gooey cheese and jamaican pepper on toast.
instructions: 1. Butter two slices of Jamaican pepper bread.
2. Place the bread slices in a toaster and toast until golden brown.
3. Top each slice with 1 tablespoon of gooey cheese.
4. Place the slices under the broiler until the cheese is melted and gooey.
5. Remove from the oven and sprinkle with salt to taste.
